summary: Apply extracted requirement amendments at runtime round boundaries.
rationale: This slice connects runtime-control amendment commands to the workflow runtime boundary so a user-added requirement is extracted, persisted, and applied before the next controller round. The change crosses runtime and runtime-control modules because the executor must pass a boundary callback into the stable workflow runtime.
deletion_targets: normalizer-backed amendment patches that bypass requirement extraction
best-effort next-round changes that do not block at a runtime round boundary
runtime-control tests that prove only fake normalization paths
line_count_rationale: Both files are pre-existing oversized coordination modules; this slice touches narrow boundary and persistence points without broad refactoring.
risks: The workflow runtime must block only at round boundaries, not mid-round.
The Conversation Agent remains the only write entrypoint; other runtime messages stay read-only.
